items.title: Former Saints LB Keith Mitchell dies at 51
items.summary: Former NFL linebacker Keith Mitchell has died, Texas A&M athletics announced on Thursday.

items.title: The French-born star carrying British hopes at Wimbledon
items.summary: Arthur Fery is left carrying British hopes at the All England Club after becoming the sole home player to reach the third round.
